perturbation.original_text: AEIS shall review all submissions within seven (7) business days.
perturbation.changed_text: AEIS shall review all submissions within ten (10) business days.
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation introduces a contradiction regarding the timeframe AEIS has to review submissions. Originally, AEIS has seven business days to review, however, this has now been modified to ten business days. This creates an in-text contradiction regarding the timeframe in which AEIS must review submissions.
perturbation.contradicted_text: AEIS shall review all submissions within ten (10) business days.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the timeframe AEIS has to review submissions from seven to ten business days. The contradicted text states that AEIS shall review all submissions within ten (10) business days. While the contradicted text and the changed text are identical, the original text created a contradiction with the contradicted text when it was modified. Because the modification makes a direct change to the deadline, this creates an inconsistency within the document, thus a contradiction exists.
